principle: Each representation and primitive maps 1:1 to a code site with a PRESENT criterion and a no-leakage / no-semantics invariant an independent auditor can check.

representations.name: run-length
representations.present_criterion: consecutive-run lengths of a symbol over the ordered sequence; symbol identity only
representations.inverts_if: a value is assigned to the symbol

representations.name: recurrence-interval
representations.present_criterion: ordinal gaps between successive occurrences of a symbol; last occurrence right-censored (no closing interval)
representations.inverts_if: future index used before it occurs

representations.name: window-distribution
representations.present_criterion: Shannon entropy (base 2) of the category distribution in a fixed sliding window; metric fixed pre-hoc (entropy only)
representations.inverts_if: an entropy variant is added after seeing results

primitives.name: self-history deviation (causal EWMA-z)
primitives.present_criterion: z at index t uses ONLY indices < t (past-only); z computed BEFORE updating EWMA with x_t; warmup WARMUP points return z=0
primitives.inverts_if: x_t enters its own mean/var before z_t is emitted (future leakage)

primitives.name: persistence-run
primitives.present_criterion: counts/masses over run-length rep; L0=3 threshold frozen

primitives.name: distribution reporting
primitives.code_site: compute_metrics returns full metrics; result stores per-metric real+null; power_audit stores per-category table
primitives.inverts_if: a single 'shakiest point' is reported as the result

invariants.no_category_value: no symbol is ever mapped to a numeric meaning-value; all math is on run/interval/entropy structure of symbols
invariants.causal_no_future_leak: causal_ewma_z is past-only; recurrence uses only realized indices
invariants.null_count_preserving: null = random.shuffle of the SAME multiset (counts preserved, only ordinal order destroyed); N_NULL=2000, SEED=20260710 frozen
invariants.target_blind: no known-incident position, no DE id, no HBB/PROCESS-01/scheduler label is passed to load_stream/metrics/null
invariants.metrics_pre_fixed: PRIMARY_METRICS = [max_run, n_runs_ge3, uppertail_run_mass, max_causal_entropy_z]; no metric added after results
invariants.primary_stream_fixed: decision on evidence_class only; decision_head reported-only
invariants.no_result_tuning: no threshold/param changed after seeing salience (PROCESS-01 log records n_null/primitive_calls)

acceptance_gate: independent auditor confirms all representation/primitive PRESENT + all invariants hold on run_ledger_salience.py BEFORE the real+null run.
status: BINDING DRAFTED — awaiting independent construct audit; RUN held.
